executive_summary: The parallax_mcp async refactor is substantially complete. All US comply. FR-4 and FR-5 do not comply: no model validation and script resolution uses inline maps instead of getScript() from @parallax/cli/models/registry.
minor_observations: (job as any).failedReason in wait_for_job bypasses BullMQ typed API — use Job<> generic instead.
flux_klein and qwen create-image entries are in the MCP's inline map but absent from IMAGE_SCRIPTS in @parallax/cli/models/registry — divergence present.
getScriptBase() / getUvPath() helpers duplicate CLI runner.ts logic — candidates for @parallax/sdk.
US-001-AC06 (manual timing with Claude) is a manual gate and cannot be verified statically.
conclusions_and_recommendations: Refactor plan: (1) Add @parallax/cli as workspace:* dep in parallax_mcp; (2) Add flux_klein/qwen to canonical IMAGE_SCRIPTS in registry; (3) Replace inline script maps with getScript(); (4) Add model validation using getModels() before submitJob().

refactor_plan.title: Add @parallax/cli dependency
refactor_plan.action: Add '@parallax/cli': 'workspace:*' to dependencies, run bun install.

refactor_plan.title: Add missing entries to canonical IMAGE_SCRIPTS
refactor_plan.action: Add flux_klein and qwen to IMAGE_SCRIPTS export.

refactor_plan.title: Replace inline script maps with getScript()
refactor_plan.action: Remove IMAGE_CREATE_SCRIPTS, IMAGE_EDIT_SCRIPTS, IMAGE_UPSCALE_SCRIPTS, VIDEO_CREATE_SCRIPTS, AUDIO_CREATE_SCRIPTS. Import getScript, getModelConfig from @parallax/cli/models/registry. Use getScript(action, media, model) in each handler.

refactor_plan.title: Add model validation to all five inference tools
refactor_plan.action: Call getModels(action, media) at start of each handler. If model not in list, return isError:true with helpful message listing valid models.

refactor_plan.title: Typecheck and regression
refactor_plan.action: Run bun run typecheck in packages/parallax_mcp. Run bun test in relevant packages.
